summary: Desktop release workflow built installers but did not attach platform binaries to GitHub Release assets.
impact: Release page for desktop-v0.1.0 only showed source archives, so users could not directly download Windows .exe or macOS .dmg installers.
fix: Updated .github/workflows/desktop-build.yml to trigger on desktop-v* tags and publish downloaded matrix artifacts to the release as binary assets.
lessons: Tag-driven desktop release flows must include an explicit release upload step and fail when expected installer files are missing.
